problem_statement: Given an array of N integers, the task is to replace each element of the array by its rank in the array.

examples.explanation: When sorted,the array is 2,6,15,20,26,98. So the rank of 2 is 1,rank of 6 is 2,rank of 15 is 3 and so.
When sorted,the array is 1,5,8,8,9,15,25. So the rank of 1 is 1,rank of 5 is 2,rank of 8 is 3 and so.
